Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear

Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: He felt the side of his head and confirmed the wound had already healed.

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air

Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: hideous healing wound on left temple, pale face
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned having a hideous wound on the temple from a revolver that is healing leaving a scar, having a pale face, and taking off his linen shirt.
